programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Harm's Way
programme.desc: Facing a 500-mile wide Siberian storm, Josh takes a big risk to keep the Cornelia Marie crew safe. Junior loses control of his rudders putting his boat at the mercy of heavy seas. Jake's greenhorn problems get a lot worse when one clogs the toilet.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Chase Boat Rescue
programme.desc: Listing heavily and taking on water, Junior calls on chase boat rescue for the first time in series history. Wild Bill sends Nick 20 feet off the deck in spite of his fear of heights. Josh and Casey hit a massive wave that knocks out greenhorn Maria.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dutch Harbor Double Cross
programme.desc: On the Summer Bay there's hell to pay when Bill's backup block goes missing. Cornelia Marie skippers Josh and Casey navigate a tenuous partnership at the Russian line. Weighed down by three full tanks, Sig puts a heavy Northwestern in Mandy's hands.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bomb Cyclone
programme.desc: The Wizard catches fire in a violent storm known as a bomb cyclone. Josh and Casey attempt to fish in 30-foot seas, while two rogue waves slam the Southern Wind. Wild Bill grinds his crew 72 straight hours bringing himself to the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Crash
programme.desc: Battling exhaustion, Wild Bill and his crew face the full wrath of the bomb cyclone. A snapped tendon puts the Summer Bay down a man. Josh gambles on crab-rich grounds in a costly venture north. An injured Mac fights to get Junior through the storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: A New Lead
programme.desc: Just as Josh, Casey and Jeff embark on a new season of fishing in Hawaii, business closures turn their world upside down. But when Josh's brother Jake uncovers a lead from their father, captain Phil Harris' past, it opens a door to a whole new market.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: As an injury knocks Sig out of his wheelhouse, Mandy takes the helm to face a disgruntled Northwestern crew. On the Wizard, damaged hydraulics and an umbilical hernia deal Keith a double gut punch. Josh and Casey suffer tragedy on the Cornelia Marie.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: Stuffed pots come at a price as Jake scrambles to repair a slack tank before it kills his crab or capsizes the Saga. Josh and Casey's rudder fails in heavy traffic and Wild Bill's new greenhorn makes an easy target for an out-of-control picking hook.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Danger Close
programme.desc: Josh and Casey race to haul pots as engine failure threatens their delivery window. As seawater destroys his hydraulic motors, Junior attempts a risky high seas delivery of three new motors. Harley and his crew bang heads over his fishing strategy.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: A New Lead
programme.desc: Just as Josh, Casey and Jeff embark on a new season of fishing in Hawaii, business closures turn their world upside down. But when Josh's brother Jake uncovers a lead from their father, captain Phil Harris' past, it opens a door to a whole new market.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Like Father Like Daughter
programme.desc: Sig and Mandy conspire to get Jake to do their prospecting, but the former deckhand seizes the moment to fill his own tanks. The Wizard crew must break through ice to rush Keith to a doctor. Junior fears the worst as a deckhand falls from the stack.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Rogue Wave Juggernaut
programme.desc: A rare weather event churns up rogue waves as supermoon tides collide with a cyclonic snowstorm. Josh and Casey face a 55-foot monster, while Jake risks capsizing to repair his rudder in unruly seas. Monte's big move north pays off in massive pots.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Problem Like Maria
programme.desc: As the super snow-moon storm peaks, the Cornelia Marie's deck becomes a gauntlet for Josh and Casey's greenest greenhorn. Ice fog overtakes the fleet as Monte scrambles to stay afloat, Harley loses an engine and Junior fights a sea-flea infestation.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: End of the Beginning
programme.desc: As the fleet mounts a final Winter season push, sad news rattles the Cornelia Marie wheelhouse. Lady Alaska greenhorn, Gabby, overcomes a painful injury to support her crew. Wild Bill's deckhands must devise a bush fix or face hauling pots by hand.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blood is Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: Saga loses a veteran deckhand, forcing Jake to steam a greenhorn army to the Russian line. Amid scuttlebutt that ports are closing due to a virus, Josh fights to get home for a reunion with his brother and Sig's daughter gets rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Irreconcilable Differences

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Man-Made Earthquakes
programme.desc: Scientists struggle to understand earthquakes, but new research has revealed that earthquakes can be triggered by not just from within the earth, but also by damns and reservoirs, mines and the oil drilling technique called fracking.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Abandoned Places
programme.desc: When the cities of man are forgotten, Mother Nature moves quickly to reclaim what is hers. Nature’s attack on abandoned homes and buildings in Detroit, New Orleans and one Caribbean paradise is waged in three very different ways.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Volcanoes
programme.desc: This look at volcanoes and how they affect the weather includes an examination of the eruption of Mount Tambora in Indonesia in 1815.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Tsunamis
programme.desc: An examination of tsunamis, what causes them, where they happen and how they move from open sea to land.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Strangest Places
programme.desc: A look at Earth's unusual places, including underwater ecosystems, subterranean spaces and igneous rock formations.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Rain
programme.desc: A look at how rain drops are formed.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Tides
programme.desc: An examination of tides including a look at the extreme tidal range of Canada's Bay of Fundy and the tidal bores of Alaska's Turnagain Arm.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Magnetic Shield
programme.desc: An examination of Earth's metallic core and how it contributes to a magnetic shield that protects the planet from harmful space radiation.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Blizzards
programme.desc: A look at how snow forms and can result in dangerous blizzards.

programme.title: Storage Wars: There Will Be Blood Money

programme.title: Storage Wars: Palm Springs Throwdown

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bozek Is My Spirit Animal
programme.desc: There are treasures for some and turmoil for others as the buyers face off in Lake Elsinore, CA.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Young Gun, Old Tricks

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buys and Dolls
programme.desc: The buyers hit Torrance for tough competition over only a few quality lockers. Brandi is forced to face her fears when Jarrod gets a locker sure to give her nightmares.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Up the Ante in El Monte
programme.desc: An auction in El Monte, CA has big lockers which means big money. Dave nabs a unit that shows he knows how to party and Rene tries to slice a bit of profit from a chilling find.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Along the Swatchtower
programme.desc: The buyers throw down in Koreatown. Dave expects to score some high-end merchandise, while Darrell struggles as he's never been to this area before. Mary fights for her lockers, and Jarrod may just push Brandi over the edge.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A San Marcos Mitzvah
programme.desc: An auction in San Marcos brings Darrell and Brandon to their home turf and Mary finds a way to deal with inflated prices.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Who Let the Daves Out
programme.desc: The buyers hit a vault auction in Huntington Beach where Dave decides to bring a few friends to help him out. Mary struggles to win a vault and keep her inexperience under wraps.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Mission Hills brings new challenges as Ivy changes his game and goes for a locker with collectables. Mary just tries to land something that will give her a quick sale.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Gambler of Thrones
programme.desc: The buyers head out to Palm Springs for an auction that brings sweet lockers and big money finds. Mary is worried that they area may be too high society for her, while Ivy sets his sights on vintage items.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Too Fast, Too Curious
programme.desc: Dave finds something that has him baffled while Ivy attempts an elusive strategy to make a score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locker Mountain High

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fontan-o-rama
programme.desc: Fontana, CA becomes FUNtana as Dave explores his lighter side and Mary tries to put a little 'Texas' into the auction.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Leader of the Packed
programme.desc: Bellflower, CA hosts an auction that has high stakes and big money finds. Ivy struggles through a bad buy to find something of value, while Dave tries to find trash among the treasure. Jarrod buys a unit that becomes a horror show for Brandi.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Padian: P.I.
programme.desc: Ivy is excited to return to an area known for the items he needs, but Jarrod and Brandi must employ sharp strategy to get a good locker. Darrel and Brandon are looking to score heavy which puts Mary at the bottom hoping for a top unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Thrill of a Kitty and the Agony of Smoked Meat
programme.desc: Darrell tries to smoke the competition and proves that sometimes treasure can look like trash. Mary struggles to wrangle information from the more experienced buyers, but Rene is not looking to share first place in the hunt for the best locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bid Strong and Prosper
programme.desc: Dan Dotson returns to the auctions in Costa Mesa, where the buyers have their sights set on Dave Hester's home turf. Darrell and Brandon take the auction over the top. Jarrod and Brandi make a discovery that takes them where no bidder has gone before.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Tinseltown Tussle
programme.desc: North Hollywood sets the scene for another auction filled with dreams of hitting it big. Mary gets a leg up on the competition with a not so secret weapon.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Island Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri shares his passion for island food by inviting four island-born chefs to cook up some delightful dishes in Flavortown. Challenges include tiny bags for picking up the ingredients required for their signature seafood dishes and blind choice.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Spring Break
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the remaining bakers to combine destination desserts with classic snacks. Then the bakers create a two-dessert landscape resembling a vacation in a national forest, amusement park, city or tropical beach.

programme.title: Cakealikes: Flavor Flav
programme.desc: Pinstripe suits, Viking helmets and the perfect grill can only mean one cakealike subject: Flavor Flav. Host Tregaye Fraser and judges Kalen Allen and Natalie Sideserf are joined by Flavor Flav himself to judge the cakes and pick the winner.

programme.title: Chopped: Smorgastarta Your Engines
programme.desc: The chefs learn all about the wonders of savory Swedish layer cake when they get the competition underway with some smorgastarta appetizers. A sweet powder and prickly produce make the entree round more complicated than the competitors wished.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Double as Nice for Half the Price

programme.title: Food Paradise: Feast from the East

programme.title: Food Paradise: Street Eats

programme.title: Chopped: Got Your Goat?
programme.desc: The chefs race to figure out what to do with a seafood product and some boozy veggies in the first round. Then, the judges must decide who's got the chops to get goat chops just right in the second round. It all ends with a tough dessert basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Chopped Catwalk

programme.desc: A routine flight turns terrifying when a bush pilot witnesses unsettling UFO activity. A former government operative reveals top-secret coordinates to an alleged alien base. A man chases a playful pair of levitating lights across Juneau, Alaska.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska: Night Stalkers
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial stalker leaves a family frozen in fear outside of Juneau, Alaska. A maritime monster nearly capsizes an aircraft on Alaska's famed Lake Iliamna. A hunter thwarts an attempted abduction by a fireball-spitting UFO.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska: Men in Black
programme.desc: A fleet of glimmering orbs stalk the skies above Anchorage. Strange men in black suits knock on the door of a UFO witness after an eerie light show in North Pole, Alaska. A woman is terrorized by a pack of small humanoid creatures that only she can see.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska: They Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Hunters unearth new clues about Bigfoot's cosmic origins. An Air Force veteran receives a shocking response when he reports UFO activity over Fairbanks. Piercing lights from above disrupt a late-night party near Wasilla, Alaska.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum: Alien Encounters in Area 51

programme.title: Bigfoot: Fear in the Woods
programme.desc: Bigfoot has roamed the earth for centuries, protected by dark forests and darker caves. The hunt for the supposed gentle giant has produced new evidence suggesting the creature is far more fierce and predatory than previously believed.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Begins
programme.desc: An elite team of specialists use an advanced data algorithm to pinpoint when and where to encounter Bigfoot. Armed with the latest technology, they are in a race against time as they search for the elusive beast in the unforgiving Oregon wilderness.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Did You Hear That?
programme.desc: With one team member down, Russell and Mireya head back into the forest to hunt down their leads. Their intense investigation uncovers their first pieces of possible Bigfoot evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Nest
programme.desc: Russell stumbles upon a structure he believes is a Bigfoot nest. Ronny and Mireya race to the nest to collect DNA samples that could break open their investigation.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Red Eyes at Night
programme.desc: Mireya and Ronny make a powerful discovery in the area surrounding the nest. When Russell suddenly falls ill, Bryce tests the theory that Bigfoot can render humans sick by emoting infrasound and is doing this to keep the team out of its territory.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Human Bait
programme.desc: The team plants tiny trackers around the clearing hoping they will cling to Bigfoot's fur. Mireya and Ronny return to where they heard whistles and saw glowing eyes. This time they have a plan: Mireya agrees to be bait in order to lure out Bigfoot.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Bigfoot Moon Rising
programme.desc: After Russell records thermal imagery he's convinced is Bigfoot, Bryce hurries to have the footage analyzed by experts. The evidence is staggering. Mireya and Ronny have a terrifying experience when they realize they're not along in the forest.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: It Knows We're Here
programme.desc: Mireya's darkest nightmare comes true. Russell investigates a possible Bigfoot underwater passageway. Bryce secures an airship to survey the final square miles for Bigfoot's heat signature.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Final Hours
programme.desc: The team believes they've finally narrowed down where Bigfoot has been hiding throughout their expedition. A high-tech drone is brought in to investigate, and what takes place next is truly astonishing.

programme.desc: When a K-9 pup discovers that her human’s police badge is missing, she enlists the pugs help! The pugs help Auggie and Mo overcome their fear during their first thunderstorm.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Mission to the Moon / Say Cheese
programme.desc: A baby wolf longs to see the moon, so Pip and Freddy embark on a mission to make her dream come true. During photo day, JP entrusts a photo-ready Lucky to Pip and Freddy’s care.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Treasure Hunters/ Up Up and Oh No

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown

programme.title: Bluey: Muffin Cone/ Circus/ Road Trip

programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: NCIS: The Good Wives Club
programme.desc: The team is called in when the body of a 'bride' is found under a military building.

programme.title: NCIS: Vanished
programme.desc: The team investigates an abandoned marine helicopter found in a crop circle.

programme.title: NCIS: Lt. Jane Doe
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team investigate the murder and rape of an unidentified Navy lieutenant.

programme.title: NCIS: The Bone Yard
programme.desc: A body found on a marine firing range leads the team to discover a Mafia dumping ground.

programme.title: NCIS: Terminal Leave
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team protect an Iraqi war veteran after a bomb is planted in her car.

programme.title: NCIS: Call of Silence
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team work to clear the name of a Second World War Medal of Honour recipient.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Belly of the Beast
programme.desc: After NCIS fails to locate a mole in the department, Under Secretary of Defense Corbin Duggan insists on new leadership, and takes over the Los Angeles unit from Hetty and Granger.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The Queen's Gambit
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates an abduction case while down two members, with Hetty being held in D.C. for questioning and another still in the ICU following the mission in Syria.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Black Market
programme.desc: After a Homeland Security agent is poisoned by a notorious Triad assassin, the team uncovers a warehouse of counterfeit purses and a money trail to stolen government funds. Also, Nell joins the team in the field.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Inert Dwarf
programme.desc: Detectives Goren and Eames learn that a murdered scientist was working with a famous physicist.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: The View From Up Here
programme.desc: A nanny confesses to a murder which she claims God told her to commit.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Collective
programme.desc: A sexy vixen, who trolls sci-fi and vampire conventions, is the suspect in a murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Motive
programme.desc: He was a force on the football field. Then, the charming athlete was shot. His killer left few clues and the case sat cold until someone spilled a secret. What police asked the tipster to do next would make her a target. How much would she risk?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: On the Outskirts of Town
programme.desc: Halee Rathgeber enjoyed taking care of others, so it made sense that she hoped to become a nurse. What made no sense was that someone wanted her dead. The crime scene told detectives little, but a jaw-dropping moment in the courtroom spoke volumes.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa Extended Stay: The Damage is Done
programme.desc: One inmate meets an untimely demise, and a convicted murderer breaks down the ways of prison, while a young, fresh-faced inmate learns about them. Another inmate mails a death threat to the White House and then carries out a shocking act.

programme.title: Lockup: Grand Rapids Extended Stay: Jailing
programme.desc: A gangbanger squares off with his victim's family in court and with another inmate in jail. A young woman is arrested for a crime reminiscent of the Grinch. And jail staff must deal with a former colleague gone bad.

programme.title: Lockup: Sacramento Extended Stay: The Eyes Have It
programme.desc: Whether you're ready for it, or not life can get treacherous and fast. How do people react when a normal day takes a terrifying turn?

programme.title: Lockup: Raw: SEG
programme.desc: Solitary confinement is the most common method of discipline used by prisons and jails, but it's also one of the most controversial.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Victims Wanted
programme.desc: A man is shot after answering a local help wanted ad. Detectives soon discover there are other victims with eerily similar stories. Their quest to locate a possible serial killer leads them to a suspected killer working for an evil manipulator.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: The Missing Bullet
programme.desc: A man discovers the body of his fiancé with an apparent self-inflicted gunshot wound. Her death is ruled a suicide but authorities are puzzled when they can't find the fatal bullet. The discovery of the missing bullet turns the case upside down.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A young woman is found with a fatal head wound and her hand on the shotgun. Her fiancé claims she killed herself but grieving family members insist the suicide scene was staged. The case goes cold until a new prosecutor takes a second look.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Red Sash Death
programme.desc: A beloved grandmother is found with a red bathrobe sash knotted around her neck. Her death looks like suicide until the Medical Examiner rules homicide. The victim's 76-year-old husband is charged with murder but the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: A husband discovers his wife face down in their bathtub. Her death appears to be an accident but questions are raised about how she drowned. Was it a drug overdose? Did she slip and fall? The investigation exposes the disturbing truth.

programme.title: Movie: Neighbors 2: Sorority Rising
programme.desc: Mac and Kelly Radner are expecting their second child, so they prepare to move out of their house. A sorority moves in next door, and the couple find that the girls are way more trouble than the fraternity. They are forced to get Teddy's help.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grade School Confidential
programme.desc: When Bart finds Principal Skinner and Mrs. Krabappel kissing, he becomes their confidante.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Canine Mutiny
programme.desc: Bart gets a credit card and goes on a shopping spree, which includes buying a purebred dog. When the repo men arrive to take back everything, Bart gives them Santa's Little Helper instead of his new dog and soon regrets it.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Old Man and the Lisa
programme.desc: When Mr. Burns loses his house and fortune, he begs Lisa to help him regain his wealth. Using Lisa's recycling program, Mr. Burns slowly gains fortune to proceed with a plan to sweep fish out of the ocean in order to make slurry.

programme.title: The Simpsons: In Marge We Trust

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Enemy
programme.desc: Frank Grimes, a man who has had a very difficult life, becomes the new employee at the power plant and quickly clashes with Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons Spin-Off Showcase
programme.desc: Troy McClure introduces three possible spin-offs from the series, including 'Chief Wiggum P.I.,' 'The Love-Matic Grampa' and 'The Simpson Family Smile-Time Variety Hour.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Secret War of Lisa Simpson
programme.desc: Bart's prank lands him a stint in military school. Lisa witnesses the discipline the cadets receive and decides to become the first female ever to join the academy, only to have a hard time fitting in.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The City of New York vs. Homer Simpson

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Hits the Road

programme.desc: In these tough economic times, Frank partners up with Dee to start a family business. All the while, a shanty town of newly poor people is forming outside the bar.

programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Icy Fortress
programme.desc: A strange complex of towers in a forest of ice and the remains of a massive Alaskan compound are now abandoned ruins; experts investigate the secrets of these forgotten icy fortresses to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Ghosts of the Colosseum
programme.desc: Rome's Colosseum is the most famous stadium on the planet, and it took cutting-edge engineering and a fallen emperor to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Fortress of the Gods
programme.desc: Rome's Pantheon hides the secret to the Roman Empire's power, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Rise of the Aqueducts
programme.desc: Rome's aqueducts are one of the greatest engineering marvels in history, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build them. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building them a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets in the Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Great Pyramid is one of the world's greatest and most mysterious marvels, and using cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering innovations, experts reveal what it would take to build the ancient wonder today.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: According to the Bible, Noah's Ark was a world-changing engineering feat, and it took cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Battle of Brooklyn Bridge
programme.desc: Experts use the latest technology, and modern-day science to reveal if building possibly the most important bridge in the world, New York's Brooklyn Bridge, a second time would be just as deadly as the first time.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Resurrecting the Titanic
programme.desc: The Titanic pushed the boundaries of engineering and luxury like never before, but it's also the most well-known disaster; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover if a modern vessel of equal opulence could be successfully built for the sea today.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Code of the Parthenon
programme.desc: The Parthenon is the crowning jewel of ancient Greek architecture and it was engineered according to a mysterious mathematical formula; expert builders examine the secrets of its design and investigate if modern-day methods could rebuilt it.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Atlantis Rises
programme.desc: The legend of the lost city of Atlantis is one of history's greatest mysteries, and cutting-edge tech could bring it back to life; experts use modern engineering to reveal if it's possible to build a megacity underwater.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Whispers from the Woods
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania town is consumed with suspicion after 19-year-old Erica Miller disappears without a trace. Her mother posts flyers around town, prompting one resident to question the strange behavior of a family friend.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Bill and Mary Yoder are a happy couple, running a medical practice outside of Utica, New York. But their world collapses when Mary becomes mysteriously sick, and detectives prove that her illness was no accident.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: High School Reunion
programme.desc: When single mother of two Latasha Edwards bumps into her old schoolmate Dammon, she thinks she's met her soul mate. But his charm hides a possessive, violent man. After they separate, Dammon's obsession deepens and Latasha fights to protect her family.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Killer Chatroom
programme.desc: A college student seeks solace online when the pressures of life begin to mount. When she meets a young nurse in a chat room going through similar troubles, the pair strike up an unbreakable bond. But she may have placed her trust in the wrong hands.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood Ties
programme.desc: A college student working as a radio station intern far from home is murdered, launching a long and frustrating investigation that leaves family and police on the brink of hopelessness until forensic genealogy leads to a man on the run for decades.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Delphi Killer
programme.desc: A quiet rural town is rocked when two middle-school girls go on a hike and are later found murdered. But when police discover one of the girls may have recorded her killer with her cellphone, the race is on to find the mysterious man.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Killer Chatroom
programme.desc: A college student seeks solace online when the pressures of life begin to mount. When she meets a young nurse in a chat room going through similar troubles, the pair strike up an unbreakable bond. But she may have placed her trust in the wrong hands.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood Ties
programme.desc: A college student working as a radio station intern far from home is murdered, launching a long and frustrating investigation that leaves family and police on the brink of hopelessness until forensic genealogy leads to a man on the run for decades.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: When a young family suddenly vanishes from their Southern California dream home, friends and family are left with dozens of unanswered questions. Authorities suspect they fled the country, until an unlikely source uncovers the truth.

programme.title: Web of Lies: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: A young girl has lewd photos of her taken at a party, with no memory of the night. Her world is turned upside down and the public shaming pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murdered in the Cold of Winter
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Stamping Ground, Kentucky, the dead body of a young woman is found late at night by her brother and father. When detectives learn the victim was pregnant, they consider it a motive for murder and begin a homicide investigation.

programme.title: My Murder Story: Last Wife Standing
programme.desc: A woman falls head over heels and marries a charming man, but she gets more than she bargained for. Confronted with the harsh reality, she undertakes her own investigation to find out who she really married.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: A Curve in the Road
programme.desc: Wendy Kratzert's van appears to have skidded off the road, but upon a closer look, it's clear this is a homicide. As detectives trace their victim's last steps, they begin to unravel secrets in one of the strangest cases that they've ever come up against.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Her Mother's Secrets
programme.desc: Loretta Bowersock is dropped off at a mall for a day of shopping, but never seen again. Investigators struggle to come up with a suspect, until they discover that Loretta had a secret that shocks her loved ones, and may finally explain her disappearance.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Mirror in the Basement
programme.desc: When Adele and Stephen Craven bring in handyman Rusty McIntire to remodel their suburban basement, it kicks off a chain of events that razes their marriage to the ground, rocks their trust in the people around them and ultimately has deadly consequences.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Ruby and John Ruffolo's marriage is threatened when John's legal troubles drive him to multiple infidelities. Leaving a streak of scorned women in his wake, John mysteriously disappears. And the hunt for him reveals a deprave reality no one saw coming.

programme.title: Betrayed: Motel Hell
programme.desc: Driven by youth, music, and her faith, Janet Chandler has dreams and aspirations of a life much larger than the small Midwestern town where she grew up. Sadly, those dreams are cut short when she's betrayed in the most horrific way possible.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Red Wedding
programme.desc: A chance encounter on a NY subway brings hard-working immigrant Gladys Ricart love, and introduces her to a lush world she'd never imagined. But her plans for a dream wedding turn into a devastating nightmare.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Two Faces of Todd Winkler
programme.desc: A former fighter jet pilot stabbed his wife to death with scissors, but swore it wasn't murder. He says she was killed because she knew too much about his deep, dark secrets.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: Home Alone: The Men Who Stole Christmas
programme.desc: In November 2009, Yei and John Daniels come home to find their house ransacked. Brushing it off, they decide to have the Christmas of a lifetime with their kids. A few days later a knock at the door changes their lives forever.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Cock-a-Doodle-Dead
programme.desc: A homeowner hopes the renters who move into the house beside him will be much better behaved than the previous tenants. When he determines they're not, the stage is set for bloody conflict and a shocking act of violence that threatens to claim many lives.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rocks of Love
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with creating a Mediterranean backyard resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary. The team builds a paradise dream complete with a 30-person infinity edge spa, over 10 fire features, and his first ever outdoor gym!

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Good Eats: If It Ain't Broccoli Don't Fix It
programme.desc: Alton Brown transforms broccoli from limp and bitter to crisp and delicious.

programme.title: Good Eats: There Will Be Oil
programme.desc: Alton looks at edible oils that offer a wide range of flavours.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Once and Future Fish
programme.desc: Alton explores sustainable farm-raised trout as a solution to over-fishing.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics V: A Pound of Cake
programme.desc: Alton considers the pound cake to be an American classic.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oaxaca
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores regional specialties in Oaxaca, Mexico. From complex mole negro sauce over Mayan-era tamales and crispy tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavors each bite.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Pittsburgh
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Pittsburgh where new restaurants are building on old culinary traditions. He tries a vegan twist on pierogies, checks out the newest wave of local chef talent at the Smallman Galley and indulges in classic dishes from Spain.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew takes us around the world as he eats his way through Queens, NY. He digs into a monster Mexican sandwich, samples some of New York's best Egyptian cuisine and feasts on Argentine meats and authentic Taiwanese fare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puglia
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Puglia, a coastal region in the heel of Italy's boot. The area's simple but stunning dishes include orecchiette pasta, grilled octopus and stuffed pasticiotti pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Fez
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Fez, the cultural and spiritual capital of Morocco.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Delhi
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Delhi, India's capital and home to roughly 24 million people.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Porto

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dip It Good
programme.desc: Cozy up with a bowl of chips because host Michael McKean has the scoop on our favorite dips. He'll discover that guacamole wouldn't be good without a mailman, queso almost started a civil war and chocolate fountains are full of physics.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Vegas, Baby!

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: War and Peace
programme.desc: Michael McKean gets caught in the middle of some culinary conflicts as he uncovers some very delicious details. He solves the Cuban Missile Crisis with chop suey, runs the redcoats out with cornbread and keeps the peace with a little kimchi.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Play With Your Food

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Bon Appetit

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: Michael McKean fans the flames of some fiery hot foods. He discovers that flaming-hot vindaloo may have once been far less combustible, wasabi isn't always what it seems and that jerk chicken is good at keeping ghosts away.

programme.desc: Minnie comes up with a special race that can include her visiting childhood friend. While the girls enjoy a spa day, the boys fill in as Happy Helpers.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Pajama Party/ The Bunny Bunch
programme.desc: When Mia and Lucky can't get along, Pip and Freddy try to broker the peace with a pajama party! Freddy learns that twin zebras are unique in their own ways.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Hanami Hijinks! / Happy Harajuku Helpers!
programme.desc: Daisy wants to celebrate Hanami with a perfect picnic, unfortunately things go a little haywire! The Happy Helpers participate in the annual Harajuku Fest in Tokyo!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Donald's Dilemma/ The Royal-ympics!
programme.desc: Donald's day of doing chores is derailed when his Uncle Manny pays him a surprise visit. Princess Olivia of Royalandia asks the Happy Helpers for help with the Royal-ympics.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bye Bye, Butterfly/ A Seat at the Theatre
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Hatches an Egg
programme.desc: The clubhouse pals discover a mystery egg among Goofy's rock collection; they try to find out what kind of animal is inside in order to return it to its mother. In the meantime, Donald Duck serves as a reluctant babysitter when the little egg develops.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Super Wish
programme.desc: Goofy wishes he could be a super-hero so that he can help out his friends.

programme.title: Bluey: Bus / Mum School / Piggyback
programme.desc: The Heelers play a game of 'Bus'. Mum and Bluey play 'Mum School' where Mum teaches Bluey how to corral her rowdy kids. Bingo decides she’s too tired to walk and needs a piggyback.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Camp Happy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Clubhouse Rocks
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals join together for a Clubhouse battle of the bands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Mouseke-Calendar
programme.desc: When the wind blows way all the pages of Minnie's daily calendar, Mickey and pals help her put it back together again and keep all of her plans up to date.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Grasshopper
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Daisy find her new friend, Wilbur the Grasshopper.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy in Training
programme.desc: Goofy finishes an obstacle course and gets a shiny medal after learning directional skills.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Lost Lion
programme.desc: Mickey volunteers to help Donald find his favourite stuffed lion for bedtime.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Comet
programme.desc: Mickey and pals are excitedly anticipating the arrival of Mickey's Comet.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sir Goofs-a-lot
programme.desc: Goofy sets out on a quest to retrieve three items in order to be knighted the bravest.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Goes Goofy
programme.desc: Goofy gets cloned after getting sprayed by Prof. Von Drake's latest experimental goo.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Big Balloon Race
programme.desc: Mickey helps Donald fly in the Big Balloon Race so he can win a big blue ribbon. They use stickers to patch up the balloon and an elephant helps weigh the balloon down after it flies into orbit. Later, they rescue Pete, who's stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Magical Mix-up
programme.desc: Goofy the Great accidentally causes Pluto's doghouse to magically disappear.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Pony Tale
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake's new Fritzer-Spritzer Spray Potion is accidentally sprayed on Daisy's ponytail, making it grow super long.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and Minnie's Jungle Safari
programme.desc: Minnie is determined to snap a photo of the Hula Hibiscus that only blooms once a year.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Secret Spy Daisy
programme.desc: A thief tries to steal Clarabelle's secret raisin cookies recipe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Doctor Daisy, MD
programme.desc: When Donald gets sick, Daisy acts as thought she's his doctor.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Pyramid Scheme/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Bongo and Rolly travel to Egypt to find the Great Pyramids. Then, the pugs try to deliver a Mother's Day card for Bob.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Home on the Range/ Miguel's Compy Conundrum
programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Monkey Chatter/ The Secret of Monkey Goodness
programme.desc: The PJs need to meditate with great seriousness, but they can’t when Munki-gu gets involved. The PJs try to stop Munki-gu's shenanigans, but get played by Night Ninja instead.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Prank Wheelz/ Where's the Wolfie Wheelz?
programme.desc: The Wolfies turn their Wolf Wheelz into Prank Wheelz. Luna Girl and Motsuki are controlling the Wolf Wheelz to wreak havoc causing the Wolfies and the PJ Masks to work together.

programme.title: Bluey: Easter/ Barky Boats/ Escape
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Bluey: Trains/ Queens/ Flat Pack
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo commute on the Dad-Train. Mum is crowned Queen with the girls as her butlers. Bluey and Bingo construct a mini-civilization.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Out of the Box/ Run Down Race Car
programme.desc: Doc's Jack-in-the-Box patient is scared about getting a check-up until Doc reassures him that his dad will be with him the whole time. Donny's toy race care loses a race for the first time; Doc gives him a check up and sees his batteries need charging.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Hallie Happy Birthday/ Shark Style Tooth Ache
programme.desc: Doc throws Hallie a surprise birthday party. Donny's toy shark breaks a tooth while playing in the bathtub. Doc gives him a check up and sees his tooth needs to be pulled.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The New Crew/ Raiders of the Lost BARK
programme.desc: The Pugs and the crew are on a mission to make sure two new puppies have fun at Playcare! The airline loses Dr. G's robot dog, so Bingo and Rolly are on the case!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Case of the Missing Badge/ Rainy, Rainy, Don't Go Away
programme.desc: When a K-9 pup discovers that her human’s police badge is missing, she enlists the pugs help! The pugs help Auggie and Mo overcome their fear during their first thunderstorm.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Pugtastic Day With Grandma
programme.desc: The pugs stay at Bob's mother's house while he goes out of town.

programme.title: Bluey: Army / Fancy Restaurant / Stumpfest
programme.desc: Jack and Rusty play Army at school. The girls set up a fancy restaurant for Mum and Dad! Bluey, Bingo and Muffin strike a deal with the dads.

programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London with no human supervision.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fan Friction
programme.desc: When Karmi starts posting fan fiction about Big Hero 6, depicting Hiro as her boyfriend, Hiro is embarrassed and wants her to stop.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Parker Plays: And I'm Shelby...
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Blackout!/ What'd I Miss?
programme.desc: Candace is put in charge of the boys right before the entire city loses electricity and they use the opportunity to make the most out of the blackout. Phineas and the gang try training domesticated squirrels to live in the wild.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London with no human supervision.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Wreck Your Neck
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: Parker Plays: S'nailed It
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape To/ From Atlantis
programme.desc: Dewey's attempts to impress Scrooge on a trip to the Lost City of Atlantis leads to trouble. Donald tries to protect the boys from his new employer who is trying to destroy them.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: La Candace-Cabra/ Happy Birthday, Isabella
programme.desc: The boys set out to prove the existence of the elusive Chupacabra to the world. Phineas and the gang celebrate Isabella’s birthday in a big way, but all she really wants is some quiet time with Phineas.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb-Busters!/ Not Phineas and Ferb
programme.desc: Irving's brother, Albert, claims to be the 'Truth Detector' and Candice enlists friends.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Get Busted
programme.desc: Candace has finally busted her brothers and sent away to Smile Away Reformatory School. How long can Candace enjoy her summer with Jeremy and Stacy instead of her usual routine?

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Wizard of Odd
programme.desc: While cleaning the house, the two brothers inadvertently send Candace away.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lake Nose Monster
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb set out to rescue the mysterious Lake Nose monster from the effects of living in a zinc-less lake.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Excaliferb!
programme.desc: During medieval times, Phineas and Ferb set off on an epic quest to find the legendary sword, Excaliferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Beak
programme.desc: A Super Villain challenges Phineas and Ferb after mistaking them for super heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: This Is Your Backstory
programme.desc: Agent P realizes there is more going on with Norm than just a simple odd reality show to celebrate his creator, Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Night of the Living Pharmacists
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' accidentally turns the citizens of Danville into contagious Doof-zombies who run rampant all over town. Agent P and the kids must work together to save Danville and avoid becoming Doof-zombies themselves.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Illusory Dragon! Mirage Fafnir!
Phineas and Ferb: Ferb Latin/ Lotsa Latkes
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create their own language, Ferb Latin, which quickly catches on. Then, when all of the potatoes in Danville go missing, Phineas and Ferb decide to clone some using Buford's last potato chip, with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Return of the Rogue Rabbit/ Live and Let Drive
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz breaks a rogue animal agent out of high security prison and Perry must go to the glamorous Duchy of Montevillebad to stop Doof from winning the Grand Prix.

programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Jenny Jones Show: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: In March of 1995, after three friends went on 'The Jenny Jones Show' to reveal a secret crush, one of them ended up dead and another was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Legend of Wild Bill
programme.desc: While coping with a fractured relationship with his son, Wild Bill rushes to convert his two million dollar investment into a commercial crabber before the season begins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Expedition X: Curse of the Old West Outlaw
programme.desc: Josh Gates' team heads west to investigate America's most haunted town. Locals claim the spirit of a notorious bandit spooks the town because of a wrongful hanging. Phil and Jess' investigation leads them into a dangerous abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Expedition X: Round-Up at Death Ranch
programme.desc: Bizarre cattle mutations in the Pacific Northwest lead Josh Gates to send his team to investigate. The baffling deaths make Jessica and Phil question if the cattle were victims of newly arrived apex predators or the target of something more sinister.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror of the Bell Witch
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives into one of America's oldest witch stories. In the Tennessee backwoods, locals report being attacked in a vast cave system. Jess and Phil go underground and uncover frightening piles of bones as well as potential human remains.

programme.title: Expedition X: Devil in the Forest
programme.desc: After receiving brand-new, frightening reports, Josh Gates sends Jessica and Phil to the woods of southern New Jersey to hunt for the infamous Jersey Devil. Locals are terrified by a demonic creature that's terrorized them for more than 300 years.

programme.title: Expedition X: An American Werewolf

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Close Encounters

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Speaks French

programme.title: Friends: The One With Princess Consuela
programme.desc: Phoebe considers changing her name to something more exotic; Joey has abandonment issues.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Estelle Dies
programme.desc: Rachel makes a startling announcement; Phoebe tries to conceal the death of Joey's agent.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
programme.desc: As Rachel prepares to leave for Paris, the gang throws her a farewell party.

programme.title: Friends: The Last One
programme.desc: Ross races to the airport so he can tell Rachel his feelings before she leaves for Paris.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Monica Gets a Roommate
programme.desc: Rachel leaves her fiancé at the altar and moves in with Monica.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Ross's ex-wife, Carol, tells him she is pregnant and wants to give the baby both her and her female lover's last names, but not Ross's. Monica goes on a manic cleaning spree to impress her parents, who favour Ross.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Thumb
programme.desc: Chandler's reunited with his beloved cigarettes, which the rest of his friends can't stand. Monica dates a man all her buddies love but with whom she's bored. And Phoebe can't deal with the fact that her bank gave her one thousand dollars that isn't hers.

programme.title: Mom: Twinkle Lights and Grandma Shoes
programme.desc: Bonnie gets cold feet when considering her future with Adam and Christy risks failing an important test in order to help a fellow alcoholic.

programme.title: Mom: Fish Town and Too Many Thank You's
programme.desc: Bonnie is suspicious when her brother, Ray returns from rehab and strikes up a friendship with Adam. Christy and Bonnie have a brush with the law when they take Ray's car for a joy ride.

programme.title: Mom: A Seafaring Ancestor and a Bloomin' Onion
programme.desc: Christy discovers she and her younger classmate, Cooper make a good team both in and out of the classroom. Meanwhile, Bonnie steps up when a newly sober Natasha fears she can't handle motherhood.

programme.title: Mom: Fancy Crackers and Giant Women
programme.desc: Bonnie suffers withdrawal after giving up cable TV to help Christy pay for her law school applications. The women rally around Jill after she has a breakdown in her favourite department store.

programme.title: Mom: Poodle Fuzz and a Twinge of Jealousy
programme.desc: When an injury temporarily lands Bonnie in a wheelchair, Christy is forced to take over as building manager and makes a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: An Entrepreneurialist and a Swat on the Bottom
programme.desc: Sheldon takes matters into his own hands when Meemaw refuses to drive him to a lecture with Dr. Linkletter. Also, Georgie tries to impress Veronica with his new business venture.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Hobbitses, Physicses and a Ball With Zip
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to take a break from science when his new obsession with 'The Lord of the Rings' leads to an unhealthy habit.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Pineapple and the Bosom of Male Friendship
programme.desc: After being released from the mental hospital, Dr. Sturgis unexpectedly breaks up with Meemaw.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Parasol and a Hell of An Arm
programme.desc: A church carnival leads Missy to try out for the baseball team. Also, Meemaw struggles after her breakup with Dr. Sturgis.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money

programme.title: Peppa Pig: The Long Grass/ Dentist/ Nature Trail/ Rebecca Rabbit/ School Bus Trip

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Ballet Lesson/ Grandpa Pig’s Boat/ Tidying Up/ Picnic/ Daddy Puts Up a Picture

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Recycling/ The Boat Pont/ Traffic Jam/ Bedtime/ Sports Day
programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig sort bottles, newspapers and tins.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Children's Festival/Muddy Festival/World Book Day/Roman Day/Foggy Day
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the children's festival. Peppa wakes up to find the festival covered in mud. It's World Book Day at playgroup. Peppa has fun dressing up as Romans. Peppa and her family get lost in the fog.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Catch That Cake!

programme.desc: A tech-savvy 10-year-old boy leads a pack of six heroic puppies in Adventure Bay.
