programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Recycling Power

programme.desc: When something goes wrong on the swamp tour, it’s Zuma and his Ultimate Swamp Vehicle to the rescue! Everything is shaking and breaking beneath Adventure Bay, so Ryder needs Rocky to lead the pups on an Ultimate Fix-it Rescue.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Emperor of El Monte
programme.desc: The buyers head to El Monte, California, where they take the local competition head-on. Darrell and Brandon score some antique loot, while Jarrod and Brandi get a rocking good locker. Ivy hits a score that may just lead to the mother lode.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Nerds of the Round Table
programme.desc: Ivy attempts to keep his winning streak alive, while Darrell and Rene play mind games with each other. After one ends up at a crime scene and the other takes a trip back in time, things get a little foggy for Jarrod and Brandi.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Enemy of the Enemy
programme.desc: Trouble comes to Mission Hills, California when a mysterious new bidder plans to dominate the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: The buyers negotiate the desert winds of Lancaster, CA.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buy, Buy Birdie
programme.desc: The buyers roll into the city of Chino, Calif. Darrell gives Brandon a chance in the driver's seat. Jarrod and Brandi discover a 'big boy' unit. Dave Hester buys in bulk and wins big. Barry buys a locker that will soar with the eagles.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hook, Line, and Sucker

programme.title: Storage Wars: Portrait of the Gambler
programme.desc: The buyers return to Montebello, Calif., where Dave Hester finds some marketing Americana and Barry buys a sweet unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: There's No Place Like Homeland
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi buy, and things quickly heat up. Barry finds something he lost in 'the divorce.' Rene and Casey buy a unit, and quickly realize that they are not in Kansas anymore.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bits and Pizzas
programme.desc: Rene sniffs out a great locker, Kenny fires up his profits and Brandi can't see the potential in the units.

programme.desc: Jenn gives the University of Texas Marching band's massive drum, Big Bertha, a beating, while Todd and Tamera face a train wreck of dental proportions when they tackle a massive train replica headed to a dental office.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A retail store worker risks her life to save a puppy, and a homeowner fights back against his family's assailants. Then, a woman working at her family business battles a knife-wielding assailant.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A father fights off a home invader with a shovel, and a street fight over a parking spot turns into a disaster for a bakery owner. Plus, a robber throws gasoline on a clerk.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A woman sneaks her boyfriend drugs to deadly results, and a judge and attorney square off during an explosive argument. Plus, a mother faces her daughter's killer: her own step-son.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering his wife defends himself in court to disastrous results, and fists fly in a Massachusetts court room.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Ron Funches
programme.desc: Ron Funches has a new healthy lifestyle, but he's willing to make an exception for Wendy's spicy chicken sandwich. The three chefs try to replicate the sandwich to his liking.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme
programme.desc: The chefs are asked to replicate the deep-fried chicken of KFC for Steve Lemee and Kevin Heffernan, the stars of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Fire at the Dispensary
programme.desc: On the anniversary of Terry saving Eddie's life and the during biggest football game of the year, the party gets interrupted when a fire breaks out at a local weed dispensary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Take the Mirror
programme.desc: Michael's candy shop customers witness a live scorpion get freed from a lollipop, and later, Michael's cocktail invention has one man drunk with envy. In the big finish, a cursed mirror turns simple reflections into reality.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sierra Volcano
programme.desc: Michael performs a revolutionary skin treatment that turns back time, and at the farmer's market, a pungent pre-historic cheese mesmerizes one shopper's taste buds. Plus, an accident with a 3D printer has Michael meeting his match.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Doughy Parts
programme.desc: At an office, Michael goes from suave to slacker in the blink of an eye. Then at a museum, a man discovers his painter's touch is worth thousands, and at a pool club, Michael and his strange friend are in the deep end with security.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: The jokers make some tough calls at a telemarketing agency that leaves everyone wondering if they're just phoning it in. Then, the guys' intentions get wishy-washy at a fountain in the mall. Plus, Q and Sal tap into their spiritual side down at the shore.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: In Poor Taste Buds
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: It's a Makeshifte
programme.desc: Find out why Michael had to get scorpion training, what animal the crew chased around a store and where Michael's favourite vacation spots are.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Might Be Trippin'
programme.desc: Find out which trick nearly wounded a delivery man, what illusion is difficult for even skilled magicians to pull off and why fans speculated the show was connected to the illuminati.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: 3D Galastical Morphin Ranging Power Tents
programme.desc: Find out what trick has Michael using an inhaler, and how the magic team surprises him during a trick. Also, find out the name of his pet tarantula, and his passions beyond magic.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Flash Melt
programme.desc: Find out which trick occurred when a location fell through at the lasts second, and how the producers dealt with screaming kids during a shoot day. Plus, find out who crossed paths with Michael months after being tricked.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Record Breakers 2

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Modern Family: Valentine's Day 4: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Jay goes from feeling disappointed to scared when Gloria's visiting sister, Sonia, becomes a large deterrence for a romantic evening with Gloria. Then, Mitchell and Cameron get themselves in a very precarious situation with their good friend Anders.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: After a long reunion weekend with Phil's old cheer buddies, Claire jumps at the chance to snag the only first-class seat left on the return flight home, leaving Phil in coach. Both have completely opposite experiences to what they were expecting.

programme.title: Modern Family: Connection Lost
programme.desc: Claire's computer becomes the hub of all the family's activities when she gets stuck at the airport and is desperate to reach Haley after a big fight.

programme.title: Modern Family: Closet? You'll Love It!
programme.desc: A peeping-Tom in the neighbourhood keeps using a drone to spy on Gloria sun-bathing, so Phil, Luke and Manny make it their mission to take it down.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spring Break
programme.desc: Claire does some spring cleaning while Phil struggles with not being a spring chicken when Luke starts outperforming him. Haley takes Alex to a music festival to take her mind off college. Gloria and Jay challenge one another to give up soaps and cigars.

programme.title: Modern Family: Grill, Interrupted
programme.desc: Jay's birthday brings everyone together and Phil is beside himself over the super cool gift he got Jay, a high-tech outdoor grill. Claire and Mitch decide they will 'offer' to pay back the money Jay loaned them ages ago.

programme.title: Modern Family: Knock 'Em Down
programme.desc: Jay agrees to sub in on Cam's bowling team for the finals. Unfortunately Cam was not fully upfront about it being an all gay league, which puts Jay in a precarious position.

programme.title: Modern Family: Integrity
programme.desc: Phil and Jay run an errand together to pick up Lily's hand-me-down princess castle for Joe. However, both are in a mood because Phil is upset that Claire won't let him buy a video game console and Jay thinks Gloria is letting Joe play with girlie items.

programme.title: Modern Family: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Alex's worst nightmare is realized when she gets news that she has to share the Valedictorian title with her number one competitor, Sunjay.

programme.title: Modern Family: Crying Out Loud
programme.desc: Determined to make Alex celebrate her senior ditch day, Phil, Luke and Haley forcefully take her out but end up on an unexpected detour. Claire is torn when she gets a job offer from a big hotel chain.

programme.title: Modern Family: American Skyper
programme.desc: The whole family is at Jay and Gloria's for Alex's graduation party, except for Phil. He ingeniously figures out a way to be there via Skype and a robotic vessel after being unexpectedly detained in Seattle on a business trip.

programme.title: Modern Family: Summer Lovin'
programme.desc: Haley's attempt to stop Andy from proposing to Beth ends up with both Haley and Andy needing to cope with their emotions and both have their own special ways of doing so. Phil and Claire seem to only make matters worse.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Day Alex Left for College
programme.desc: Phil and Claire are feeling a little snubbed by their kids when Alex intentionally gives them the wrong college move-in date to avoid making it a big deal. Meanwhile, Luke seems less than eager to spend the day with Phil at his open house.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.desc: The most unbelievable, surprising, and OMG things about Brad Pitt from his steamiest movie scenes to his shocking pre-fame jobs.

programme.desc: Miranda's feelings for Skipper intensify when she sees him with another woman.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: Carrie meets Big's ex-wife; Charlotte's boyfriend wants to participate in a threesome.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Turtle and the Hare
programme.desc: Mr. Big tells Carrie that he won't marry again; Samantha tries to turn a man into a catch.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Baby Shower
programme.desc: A baby shower for a friend gets the girls thinking about their future.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Drought
programme.desc: Carrie is convinced that she and Mr. Big will never share a bed again.

programme.title: Sex and the City: O' Come All Ye Faithful
programme.desc: Miranda breaks up with Catholic Guy because of his sexual hang ups and returns to Skipper.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Mother Armenia
programme.desc: Kim and Khloé visit the land of their ancestors to fulfill a long-standing dream of their father's. Kourtney wants to figure out why Kylie is being so distant and the truth is something unexpected.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: It Feels Good to be Home
programme.desc: Kanye says 'thank you' to Armenia by playing a surprise public concert there. Kim arranges a special stop in Jerusalem to have North baptized in Israel's oldest Armenian Church. Back in LA, everyone responds differently to having Caitlyn in their lives.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vanity Unfair
programme.desc: When Caitlyn comes out in her first big magazine interview and says things the family considers hurtful, Kim does what she can to pick up the pieces. Meanwhile, Khloé must decide how much emotional support she can afford to give to Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Last Straw
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to keep it together as Scott's behavior spirals out of control, but when he's photographed in France with another woman, Kourtney is not sure how much more she can take. Khloé decides she must meet Caitlyn face to face.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: That Was Then This Is Now
programme.desc: Caitlyn is receiving a special award at the ESPYs, but with Kris still sore over public comments Caitlyn made about their marriage, the daughters must find a way to support Caitlyn while still being sensitive to Kris's feelings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Price You Pay
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to find a new status quo with Scott while the rest of the family worries she's give in to him too easily. Khloé thinks twice about how much she does for her sisters. Kris braces for landfall as Kim and Kanye prepare to move back in.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rites of Passage
programme.desc: When Kylie graduates from high school, Kris decides to throw an extra special party. Kim's pregnancy cravings take her half way around the world. Khloé responds to a presence in her house by getting in touch with her psychic side.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: How the Other Half Lives
programme.desc: Andy Cohen and Real Housewives' Kyle, Teresa, and Caroline look at Reality TV’s fascination with the wealthy with never-before-seen footage. Plus, how hit shows like 'Love & Hip Hop', 'Jersey Shore', and 'Below Deck' turned regular people into mega-stars.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: Celebs: Just Like Us!?
programme.desc: The Osbournes, The Kardashians, Kendra Wilkinson, and Danny Bonaduce reveal the pros and cons of pioneering 'celebreality'. Host Andy Cohen ambushes Kim, Khloe, Kourtney, and Kris on set for behind the scenes stories of their iconic series.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: Is It Real?
programme.desc: Find out what was real and what wasn’t on some of reality TV’s first hit shows, when stars like Richard Hatch ('Survivor') and Julie Chen ('Big Brother') tell all. Andy Cohen reunites four original cast members of 'The Real World'; secrets are revealed.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: Addicted to Love
programme.desc: Stars of '90 Day Fiancé', 'Catfish', 'Rock of Love', and 'Temptation Island' reveal what really happened when they searched for love on reality TV. Jason and Molly Mesnick spill secrets of 'The Bachelor'.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Patriarch of Perfection
programme.desc: Meet the Chrisley family, where Todd Chrisley is king. He micromanages his family just like his business and always tries to stay five steps ahead of his five children.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Savannah is turning sweet 16, and a big birthday bash is in the works. Todd has to come to grips with the fact that his little girl is growing into a young woman. At the party, Todd keeps a watchful eye on girl-crazy Chase.

programme.title: Chopped: Gimme Gator
programme.desc: Strange incarnations of everyday ingredients challenge the chefs. Black garlic and coconut vinegar stump the chefs in the appetizer round, must use alligator in their entree and a Peruvian fruit in the dessert round.

programme.title: Chopped: Amped For Ramps
programme.desc: Competitors find a member of the onion family in the first basket, an organ meat and Italian treat in the second and in the dessert round, chefs must use a popcorn-flavored candy and a citrus-flavored stalk.

programme.title: Chopped: Think Small!
programme.desc: The chefs are excited to find a small plates theme in effect for their competition. The judges-including Martha Stewart- are expecting modern, creative dining experiences.

programme.title: Chopped: Terrine Cuisine
programme.desc: The chefs must hop to it and make rabbit terrine work with a less highfalutin, packaged product in their appetizers. Combining cake mix and ramen is part of the challenge in round two, and a weird ice cream and a curious condiment test the two finalists.

programme.title: Chopped: Martha Rules: Tick Tock!
programme.desc: Martha Stewart takes the reins for another gripping battle in the $50,000 Martha Rules tournament, and she has some tricks up her sleeve regarding the timing of the rounds. The three chefs who make it to the second round must whip up Cornish hen entrees.

programme.title: Chopped: Bacon, Burgers and Beer
programme.desc: In what may be the best Chopped competition theme ever, the chefs' baskets are packed with bacon, burgers and beer. In the bacon appetizer round, the competitors go in some inventive directions with their dishes.

programme.title: Chopped: Chock-Full of Chocolate
programme.desc: Four pastry chefs’ steps into the Chopped kitchen to show off their chocolate skills. A chocolate-covered seafood snack is a sneaky surprise in the appetizer basket, and a tart fruit and a Japanese food staple find their way into the entree basket.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm Suppers
programme.desc: Molly is cooking up her most delicious and memorable suppers from her early days on the farm. She makes two upper-Midwest classics for a weeknight dinner with her husband Nick and his parents including chicken pot hot dish and a sweet cookie 'salad.'

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Girl's Brunch
programme.desc: Molly treats her girlfriends to her favourite brunch dishes after a night out in Grand Forks. There's mini quiches with peas and bacon, garlicky lemony kale and a dark chocolate scone loaf with marzipan for a sweet treat.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Playdate
programme.desc: Molly Yeh invites her sister-in-law Anna and her baby Cliff over for a playdate with Molly's daughter Bernie. They work up quite an appetite with all that playing, so Molly makes homemade granola bar treats.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Simple Shabbat Dinner, Perfect Sunday Morning Breakfast
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband celebrate Shabbat with a delicious, no-stress dinner. Molly makes orange juice challah, shawarma stuffed peppers and gingersnap coconut icebox cake. Then she uses leftover challah in strawberries and cream stuffed French toast.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night on the Town
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is having a night on the town with Ladd at a big bash for the Osage Cattlemen's Convention, so she's taken care of dinner for the kids to eat back at home. She prepares a slam-in-the-oven mini meatballs pasta bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Never Enough Puff
programme.desc: Ree shares her top five favorite things to do with puffed pastry, her secret weapon for entertaining made easy! First, cheese straws and sausage parmesan palmiers are a duo of divine quick and easy canapes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Brunch Is in the Fridge!
programme.desc: Ree hosts brunch and makes things easy with a make-ahead spread. She gathers ingredients for a customizable bloody Mary, makes a tater tot casserole, fresh citrus salad with champagne vinegar dressing and pours some tropical bellinis for friends.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Almost Healthy
programme.desc: Ree is making almost healthy and totally fabulous versions of classics. There's everyone's favourite cheeseburger sliders with portobellos instead of buns, fantastic cauliflower fried rice, zucchini lasagna and almost-instant fast and fruity ice cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Easy Entertaining
programme.desc: Ree hosts a cooking and eating get-together with her Oklahoma City Thunder friends. The menu includes white spinach artichoke lasagna and a butternut kale salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Spring is in the Air
programme.desc: Ree Drummond celebrates springtime with seasonal recipes like shrimp with zucchini noodles and an easy lamb stew. She uses a shortcut for cheesy ham and egg hand pies that everyone loves, and her grain salad is fresh, vibrant and super simple.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Budget Games Blowout
programme.desc: The chefs must work with an extreme budget that includes making an elevated sandwich with ingredients that are under $4 but it doesn't get much better for them when they visit the Food Wheel. They will have to make a childhood favourite on a tight budget.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Chocolate Games
programme.desc: Four chocolate masters compete to turn this rich treat into sweet and savory dishes that could earn one of them up to $20,000. First, they have to flip a German chocolate cake into the ultimate lunch.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Spiciest!

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Deer Horn Knives

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Kampilan
programme.desc: The scrapyard provides bladesmiths with the supplies needed to forge their signature blades, along with a coal forge. The final round sees the smiths tasked with recreating an imposing battle weapon, the Kampilan.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Rhomphaia
programme.desc: The first-round blades must contain one of six Damascus patterns, which must be wisely selected. The smiths must stack, weld and repeat, crafting durable blades to secure a finals spot. Two remaining smiths must recreate the Rhomphaia sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Kabyle Flyssa

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Bhuj
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must forge a canister damascus out of an old barber's chair, using only barbershop tools. One competitor must restart with only 45 minutes remaining. The two finalists are tasked with recreating a fine, fierce weapon, the Bhuj.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Cold December Morning

programme.title: Snapped: Opal Williams
programme.desc: When police searching for a missing Indiana man discover a body on a riverbank, they launch an investigation that unearths a surprising story of an open marriage and evidence of a brutal torture.

programme.title: Snapped: Lisa Jones-Orock

programme.title: Snapped: Sharon Halstead

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Bathtub Mystery

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock

programme.title: Unearthed: Catastrophe of Vesuvius
programme.desc: Fresh archaeological clues reveal the destruction caused by Mount Vesuvius may be more catastrophic than originally imagined; experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the mystery behind the most famous and deadly volcano of the ancient world.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The First Oceans
programme.desc: A discovery suggests the true origins of Earth's oceans are far more exotic than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Uranus and Neptune: Rise of the Ice Giants
programme.desc: Uranus and Neptune are mysterious, icy worlds at the edge of our solar system, and new discoveries reveal that these strange planets might have helped start life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Milky Way
programme.desc: New research may now be able to answer the question that asks what built the Milky Way. In the very centre of our galaxy is an extremely large black hole that is one of the most destructive objects in the universe. This could possibly be the answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Interstellar Mysteries
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that interstellar space, the space between the universe's stars, is not empty and unremarkable as previously thought, but full of weird objects and strange phenomena that might hold the darkest secrets of our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Mercury
programme.desc: Mercury is a deadly world, facing attacks from the Sun, comets, and other planets, and even though it's the smallest planet in our solar system, it has a dangerous secret a dangerous secret that might one day threaten life on Earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of Jupiter
programme.desc: Recent discoveries by NASA's Juno mission reveal new secrets about Jupiter, a strange world that is more like a star than a planet. As scientists uncover what lies beneath its violent storms, our understanding of the solar system could change forever.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Pluto's Strange Secrets
programme.desc: NASA's mission to Pluto gathered the first close-up pictures of this strange and distant world, and now, new discoveries and the latest science reveal the secrets of its alien features, which could point to extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Time Travel Enigma
programme.desc: Recent discoveries in the cosmos are proving that time travel is less impossible than we think, while the newest discoveries in space and theoretical physics have us on the brink of cracking one of the universe's greatest puzzles.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Curse of Dark Matter
programme.desc: Recent discoveries have revealed vast clouds of dark matter in our universe. This mysterious matter could be proof that multiple universes exist.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: New Race to the Moon
programme.desc: New discoveries show that the Moon could be our next home for human life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Hunt for the Missing Black Holes
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally reveal how supermassive black holes are made, and using the latest technology, experts are on the verge of understanding how these monsters grow and how they affect life on our planet.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mars's Alien Secrets
programme.desc: Experts are rethinking everything they know about the Red Planet, now that the latest NASA missions to Mars might finally reveal if it is home to alien life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Wrath of the Sun
programme.desc: Experts are uncovering the deadly secrets of our solar system's star, and revealing the apocalyptic threat it could possibly present to life on Earth.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ozark Enchantment
programme.desc: Trying to make her way in the Ozarks, Joy Dishneau set her sights on becoming a small business owner. But when she is found murdered in her own shop, all of her employees become suspects.

programme.desc: Miles City, Montana, holds its breath while police search for missing husband and father Marty Etchemendy. As they race to find Marty alive and track down those who ripped him from his family, an air of evil permeates an abandoned car 100 miles from town.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Who Wanted Him Dead?
programme.desc: A US soldier who's been to war in two foreign lands meets harm in Upstate New York and his killers may have been his fellow GIs. Then, a young father and aspiring politician disappears, with the main clue his last, haunting voicemail.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Not in My Yard
programme.desc: A rash of break-ins shatters the peace in a tight community, and when residents take sides along the fault lines; good friends turn into deadly enemies.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Hundred-Mile Murder
programme.desc: Miles City, Montana, holds its breath while police search for missing husband and father Marty Etchemendy. As they race to find Marty alive and track down those who ripped him from his family, an air of evil permeates an abandoned car 100 miles from town.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Who Wanted Him Dead?
programme.desc: A US soldier who's been to war in two foreign lands meets harm in Upstate New York and his killers may have been his fellow GIs. Then, a young father and aspiring politician disappears, with the main clue his last, haunting voicemail.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Cock-a-Doodle-Dead
programme.desc: A homeowner hopes the renters who move into the house beside him will be much better behaved than the previous tenants. When he determines they're not, the stage is set for bloody conflict and a shocking act of violence that threatens to claim many lives.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Nanny Nightmare
programme.desc: Donna is fit,beautiful, and maternal -exactly what Dennis Yaklich needs as a single dad to four kids. Soon his children see another side to their new stepmom.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: A Murder You Can't Ignore
programme.desc: Successful and newly single, Colleen Batten is having a hard time starting over when she bumps into old flame, Bob Harris. She plans to change her luck with this father of three. His kids soon find out just how evil Colleen can really be.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Murder Has Two Faces
programme.desc: When her husband cuts her off financially, Diane Hart turns to her older sister for help. Together, the sisters come up with a deadly plan to get at the money Diane feels she deserves.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: A Shot in the Dark

programme.title: Evil Twins: Twin vs. Twin
programme.desc: Identical twins Ron and Tron find solace with one another in their big family. Even though they have physical limitations due to medical issues, both are able to live fruitful lives. Ron is even able to find a blossoming love that soon turns deadly.

programme.title: Motives & Murders: Why Isn't She Smiling?
programme.desc: A high school senior is murdered in her family's Minnesota farmhouse, but with little evidence the case soon goes cold. Years later, a fresh set of eyes spots an overlooked clue, but cold case detectives will need more to convict the killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: A pretty social media sensation and an NBA superstar connect online. But as the relationship heats up, extortion and threats of violence turn their romance into a nightmare.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Murder Haunts Me
programme.desc: A young mother-to-be is shot and left for dead. To catch her assailant, Kenda must elicit a death-bed confession from the victim herself. Then...a corpse found floating in Monument Creek leads Kenda to a mysterious encampment on a nearby riverbank.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: From the Mouths of Babes

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Fatal Family Secrets

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: A Fresh Start

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain

programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Civil War Conspiracies
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: What's Up Dock?
programme.desc: Lucas builds a giant pool for a dear friend-turned client. Lucas creates a dream backyard with a dock, cascading waterfalls a fire pit and audio/visual entertainment swim-up bar.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Carolina Catamaran
programme.desc: A couple of pro builders construct an upcycled off-grid homestead deep in the sprawling South Carolina islands. Plans for the catamaran-style home include a luxury yacht aesthetic, but the couple must build during hurricane season to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Michael Reynolds is an architect and visionary that created the Earthship. Earthships are houses that are completely self-sufficient and totally off the grid with no electricity or water bills - ever.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid

programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: North Carolina Pick and Haul
programme.desc: The gang travel to North Carolina in hopes of salvaging a Mediterranean-style mansion in Charlotte and an iconic sign in Raleigh. Though many of the items have been set aside, loading stone tubs and three-tier chandeliers presents its own challenges.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1684 Basement Gut Job
programme.desc: Jeff heads to Aston, PA, to restore the basement of one of the oldest houses in the area. The owners want to use the space for entertaining, so Jeff creates two bar areas, a sitting area, and restores an adjacent space to make a mudroom and entryway.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s Master Bedroom and Library
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin restores a master bedroom and library in an amazing stone home in Bucks County, PA. The original home dates back to 1700 but the two rooms sit in additions that came later and lack some of the historic character.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Guest House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff restores a kitchen and living room in a 1760 farmhouse for Tracey and Scott, who now use it as a guest house. The house was the original structure on their farm, which now contains a newer main house and several outbuildings.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1785 Three-Room Makeover
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on his latest project, a 1785 stone farmhouse owned by the Vitale family in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. Jeff's first task is to give a facelift to the 230-year-old fireplace. He then moves on to the kitchen and mudroom.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1729 Kitchen and Living Room Addition
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin heads to a 1729 home to look at the kitchen and living room additions. He brings in reclaimed barn beams to create a threshold in between the rooms, adds a unique blend of rustic cabinetry and makes a coffee table out of a surprise piece.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Master Suite
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on a dated master suite in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. Kim and Rob's 18th century house was damaged by a fire and last renovated in the 1980s.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Master Suite in a Barn
programme.desc: John and Tina own a converted 1740s barn and they need help with their awkward master bedroom and bath.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1817 Chopped-Up Kitchen
programme.desc: Brandon, the owner of an 1817 stone house, needs help with his kitchen. The kitchen was converted from a side porch in the 1970s, but the strange layout and the materials don't match the rest of the house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1859 Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited by friends Scott and Melanie to renovate the 1980s kitchen addition on their 1859 farmhouse. The previous owner did his best to preserve some 19th century style, but the layout doesn't work and the features are dated.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Saving a 1717 Spring House
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin and his team take on one of their most challenging projects, a dilapidated 1717 spring house. Homeowners Barbara and Joseph want to turn the spring house into a guest house with a writing space for author Barbara.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roadside 'Cue
programme.desc: While road-tripping through Texas, Roger Mooking pulls the car over for some seriously delicious barbecue. In San Antonio, he makes a pit stop at The Box Street Social food truck to hang chickens and racks of ribs over a live fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: A Tale of Two BBQs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits an old-school barbecue institution serving chopped pork in South Carolina and a popular restaurant serving Hill County barbecue classics in Texas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Maui, Hi
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Hawaii, where he embraces the aloha spirit and takes on a whopping three-and-a-half-pound burger.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek brings him to Manhattan for historic pizza-by-the-slice, a transcendent take on an Old World baked good and over five pounds of undefeated dessert in the Giant Ice Cream Scoop Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Family Feast
programme.desc: In Memphis, Michael Symon sits down with four generations of barbecue royalty for the scoop on their most delicious family secrets, with a side of smoked turkey and sweet potato fried pie.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco: Second Bite

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charleston

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Memphis

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Crazy for Crunch

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Atlanta

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New England

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago may be famous for its architecture, but we're here for the food. We've got a deep love for Gino's deep dish pizza, and the pork rinds at Publican are some of the best ever. The classic Chicago dog at Weiner Circle can't be topped.

programme.title: Amphibia: Night Drivers/ Return to Wartwood

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: I Was a Middle Aged Robot/ Suddenly Suzy
programme.desc: Candace is determined to win this year's father-daughter obstacle course, but unfortunately, Lawrence finds Agent P's lair and his memory is accidentally erased by a gadget.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Mom Attractor/ Cranius Maximus

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Confessions of a Beauty Queen
programme.desc: With Savannah and Chase leaving the nest in the next few years, Todd and Julie decide it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18
programme.desc: After 18 years of counting down the days, Chase is finally 18! When he tells Todd that he will no longer follow the house rules such as a curfew, Todd decides it’s time to give his son a dose of reality and show him what it’s really like to be an adult.

programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Englewood Killer
programme.desc: Chicago police are investigating the murders of several women, whose bodies are discovered in abandoned buildings barefoot. Evidence indicates there is one offender, now police need to locate him.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Classified to Kill
programme.desc: Chicago detectives believe a serial killer is using the classified ads to lure and murder his victims. The investigation is set ablaze when flames obliterate evidence, until police make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Murders at the Boarding House: Special, Part 1
programme.desc: Following up a missing person's report, Detective John Cabrera visits the boarding house of Dorothea Puente. She is friendly and cooperative, but after Cabrera discovers a body in her backyard, Puente gives him the slip and goes on the run.

programme.title: Murders at the Boarding House: Special, Part 2
programme.desc: While Detective John Cabrera digs into Dorothea Puente's dark past, she is plotting her next move from an L.A. motel room – until a tip-off leads to her arrest. She is flown back to Sacramento to be prosecuted for nine counts of murder.

programme.title: Catching a Serial Killer: Bruce McArthur
programme.desc: Bruce McArthur was many things; friend, grandfather, mall Santa, landscaper, and a ruthless serial killer who buried body parts in the yards of his posh clientele. This is the true story of the race to catch Toronto's most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Bathtub Mystery
programme.desc: She was a beaming bride. It was a haunting death. Sarah and Ryan were newlyweds when she drowned in the bathtub. Did she die of natural causes or was it deliberate? It took three trials to find the truth.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Victims Wanted
programme.desc: A man is shot after answering a local help wanted ad. Detectives soon discover there are other victims with eerily similar stories. Their quest to locate a possible serial killer leads them to a suspected killer working for an evil manipulator.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Gustafsons
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Stovalls
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Williams
programme.desc: Raised in a strict home, sheltered from the outside world, Matthew and Tyler believe it's their duty to cleanse the world of those living in sin. When two men are found dead the brother's connection to them points toward a hateful trail of crime.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Fugitive Millionaire
programme.desc: A tech giant living in paradise. His neighbor found dead. Then, suddenly, the entrepreneur extraordinaire was on the run, taunting authorities and tantalizing the press. It was a riveting game of hide-and-seek, but were police chasing the right man?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Death Trap
programme.desc: Pizza deliveryman Brian Wells robbed a bank with a bomb locked around his neck and, from there, it turned into one of the strangest cases the FBI has ever encountered.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Everything She Knew
programme.desc: Amber Belken was a young woman with big dreams. Then, she was found murdered. Was Amber the victim of a robbery gone wrong or was this brutal crime personal? Three people knew the truth. Two of them would risk their lives to reveal it.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: He Wasn't Alone
programme.desc: When a Florida teen tending to some yard work digs up a frightening scene, investigators find themselves in the middle of a twisted affair. A wild trail of evidence leads them across three state lines and the discovery of an astounding truth.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a beautiful garden turns into a dark abyss, the serenity in Salem, Oregon is shattered. All is not as it seems as investigators dig into the life of a single mom. As the grisly details begin to unfold, the chase is on to catch a killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Fatal Mistake
programme.desc: A bizarre trail from South Dakota to Minnesota ends in a dark discovery and a case gone cold. While investigators question whether a man of God is the key to solving this mystery, they fear blind faith is not only risky, but could prove to be deadly.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: A deadly mystery with deep running roots snakes through a small Alabama town, shattering a young family and baffling the community. Investigators unlock long held Southern secrets to solve a murder and discover a truth steeped in blood and revenge.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Last Call
programme.desc: An unsuspecting field worker makes a horrifying discovery in a backyard orchard and detectives chase down deadly clues. But when a savage killer slips through the cracks, innocent lives are threatened and solving this case is suddenly in jeopardy.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Carrollton Plot
programme.desc: This is a story about faith, temptation and secrets. A churchgoing mom was shot at point-blank range in her garage. Saving her would take a miracle and investigators wanted to know if this crime was random or if someone wanted her dead.

programme.title: Movie: Night School
programme.desc: A man who's tired of his dead-end life and humiliating job signs up for night school so that he can pass the GED exam and finally be a high school graduate, but with an eclectic group of students the teacher turns to unconventional ways of teaching.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Better Off Sled

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Lorenzo's Oil? No, Linda's

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: The Secret to Their Success
programme.desc: The insects and their close relatives are the most abundant and diverse group of animals in the world. The secret to their success could be their external skeleton and their size.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Space's Great Wall

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Dead Planets

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Aliens of the Microcosmos
programme.desc: The hidden kingdom of microscopic alien organisms shapes the universe as much as galaxies, stars, and planets. New discoveries reveal how bacteria, viruses, and other alien micro-organisms built life on Earth and influence humanity's future in the cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Curse of the White Dwarf
programme.desc: White dwarfs are small, dead stars with a dangerous side, capable of exploding into supernovas and destroying planets; new research suggests these mysterious phenomena may be the key to understanding the universe itself.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: Astronauts have detected a mysterious region of space that's dangerous for reasons they have yet to understand, and scientists believe the long-term effects of this danger zone may have implications for the future of humanity both in space and on Earth.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Mayan Murders
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Maze of Cryptic Terror
programme.desc: A team of explorers discover a forbidding cave system riddled with ancient markings that seem to contain a mysterious meaning; using advanced photogrammetry, experts finally decode these cryptic scrawls to expose a dark chapter of English history.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: Crew-2 Launch
programme.desc: Follow live coverage of SpaceX and NASA as they launch Crew-2, sending a global team of astronauts to the ISS for critical research.

programme.title: How It's Made: Super Robots
programme.desc: Discover how educational robots and boat radar mounts are constructed, and see how boxing belts are handcrafted.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Mayan Murders
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Grave of the Red Skulls

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
